metadata.title: Kagoshima Universal Tourism | FUKU-TABI
metadata.description: A matching service connecting travelers who need physical assistance with experienced caregivers in Kagoshima.
metadata.travelerApplyDescription: Application form for travelers who need care support.
metadata.toursDescription: Kagoshima barrier-free tours for wheelchair users and those needing care. Travel with confidence with welfare taxis and support staff.
metadata.partnerDescription: Meet the welfare taxi partners of FUKU-TABI. Wheelchair-accessible vehicles and qualified drivers eliminate travel worries.

footer.description: A matching service connecting travelers who need physical support with experienced caregivers in Kagoshima.
footer.contactText: Feel free to contact us with any questions.

hero.title: Don't give up on
hero.description:
Travelers who need physical support can enjoy trips with experienced caregivers by their side.
We make that possible, starting from Kagoshima.
hero.strength1: Operated by licensed acupuncturist & care workers

serviceIntro.title: Who uses our service
serviceIntro.subtitle: Even if you've given up on traveling — please reach out
serviceIntro.item2: Those anxious about walking or moving
serviceIntro.item3: Those with visual or hearing impairments
serviceIntro.item5: Those whose family cannot accompany them

flowPreview.title: How It Works
flowPreview.subtitle: We support you every step, from consultation to travel
flowPreview.step1Desc: Call or email us anytime. Tell us your travel wishes and concerns.
flowPreview.step2Desc: We confirm your needs and propose the best-matched caregiver.
flowPreview.step3Desc: Your caregiver accompanies you, providing safe support from departure to return.
flowPreview.step4Desc: We listen to your feedback after the trip and work to make the next one even better.

safetyTeaser.title: Our Commitment to Safety
safetyTeaser.description: We maintain a safe environment through caregiver verification, staff oversight, and emergency response protocols.

joinTeaser.title: For Those Who Want to Become a Caregiver
joinTeaser.description: Use your care and welfare experience to accompany travelers. Training is available even for those without prior experience.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From application to travel in 3 simple steps
howItWorks.step1Description: Fill in the form with your destination, schedule, and required support.
howItWorks.step2Description: Our staff reviews your application and selects the best-matched caregiver.
howItWorks.step3Description: After matching, prepare with your caregiver and enjoy a safe, comfortable journey.

features.title: Why FUKU-TABI
features.subtitle: So you can travel with confidence
features.safetyDesc: Only certified care professionals are registered. Credential verification and interviews ensure peace of mind.
features.nationwideDesc: We cover all of Kagoshima Prefecture, including remote islands.
features.planningDesc: We assist from the planning stage, including barrier-free accommodation research.
features.diverseDesc: Wheelchair, transfer, meal, restroom, visual support, and more.
features.privacyDesc: Personal information is strictly managed and kept private until a match is confirmed.
features.interviewDesc: Meet your caregiver before the trip to confirm compatibility and plans.

cta.title: Feel free to consult us first.
cta.description: "Can I even travel?" "What kind of support is available?" — any question is welcome.

flow.pageDescription: We support you through 6 careful steps, from consultation to travel.
flow.intro: First-timers are welcome. Our staff will guide you through every step.
flow.step1Description: Please feel free to call or email us. Even if you're not sure whether you can travel, that's okay. We'll answer any question you have.
flow.step1Note: Contact us by phone, email, or the inquiry form on this site
flow.step2Description: Our staff will carefully ask about your destination, schedule, wishes, and support needs. Feel free to share any medical concerns or worries.
flow.step2Note: Approximately 30–60 minutes by phone or online
flow.step3Description: Based on the assessment, we select a caregiver suited to your needs, considering gender, experience, qualifications, and support capabilities.
flow.step3Note: We will contact you within 3–5 business days
flow.step4Description: Before the trip, you will meet your caregiver to confirm the route, preparations, and emergency procedures.
flow.step5Description: Your caregiver accompanies you from departure to return, providing safe support for transportation, accommodation, sightseeing, and meals.
flow.step5Note: You can contact our staff in case of emergency
flow.step6Description: After the trip, we ask for your feedback to improve future experiences. Please share any thoughts at any time.
flow.ctaDescription: Even if you're not sure whether you can travel, that's completely fine.
flow.ctaSectionTitle: Ready to Take the First Step?
flow.ctaSectionDesc: Whether in the planning stage or with a specific request, we are here to listen.

safety.pageDescription: We have various initiatives in place to ensure users can feel safe using our service.
safety.intro: We consider safety and security to be the most important aspects of this service. Below we explain our initiatives.
safety.item1Description: Our staff carefully conducts an assessment before the trip, confirming the destination, schedule, support needs, and medical considerations, then sharing this with the caregiver.
safety.item2Description: We verify qualifications, experience, and conduct interviews with prospective caregivers. While not yet an official certification system, we carefully select trustworthy individuals.
safety.item3Description: Our operations staff remains available during travel. If any issues arise between caregivers and travelers, we will intervene and respond.
safety.item4Description: In the event of any trouble, our staff will respond promptly. We provide emergency contact information in advance so you can travel with confidence.
safety.item5Description: Personal information entrusted to us will not be used for purposes other than matching. Both parties' information remains private until a match is confirmed.
safety.item6Description: We are currently developing a caregiver training program and identity verification system. We will continue to improve our environment for your safety.
safety.ctaTitle: Please consult us about any concerns
safety.ctaDescription: If you have any safety concerns, please feel free to contact us.

contact.pageDescription: For travel consultations or service inquiries — any question is welcome.
contact.notice: After submission, our staff will contact you within 3 business days. For urgent matters, please call us.

caregivers.noResult: No caregivers found. Please try different filters.

caregivers.ctaDescription: We will suggest a caregiver suited to your needs. Please feel free to consult us.
caregivers.placeholderNote: Caregiver profiles will appear once registrations are complete

faq.pageDescription: Frequently asked questions about our service.
faq.ctaDescription: Please feel free to contact us. Our staff will answer your questions.
faq.a1: Anyone who needs physical support is welcome. This includes wheelchair users, those with difficulty walking, those with visual or hearing impairments, and elderly travelers. Please feel free to consult us.
faq.q2: What kind of people are the caregivers?
faq.a2: Our caregivers hold qualifications such as Certified Care Worker, Home Helper, Nurse, and Sign Language Interpreter. All registrations are verified through credentials and interviews.
faq.a3: Costs vary depending on travel content, schedule, and support needs. We currently provide individual quotes after consultation. Please contact us.
faq.a4: We primarily serve Kagoshima Prefecture, including Kagoshima City, Satsuma Peninsula, Osumi Peninsula, Amami Oshima, and remote islands. Please consult us for travel outside the prefecture.
faq.q5: How long does it take from application to travel?
faq.a5: The process from consultation through assessment and caregiver matching typically takes 1–2 weeks. We recommend contacting us well in advance.
faq.q6: Can I request a specific gender for my caregiver?
faq.a6: Yes, we will accommodate gender preferences to the extent possible. Please let us know during the assessment.
faq.q7: What happens if something goes wrong during the trip?
faq.a7: Our staff remains available during travel. In emergencies, the caregiver will contact our team and we will respond promptly. Emergency contact information is provided before departure.
faq.q8: How is my personal information managed?
faq.a8: Your personal information is managed according to our Privacy Policy and will not be used for purposes other than matching. Both parties' information remains private until a match is confirmed.
faq.q9: I want to become a caregiver. What should I do?
faq.a9: Please see the 'Become a Caregiver' page. Those with qualifications and experience are welcome, as are those who wish to participate after completing our training program.
faq.q10: Can you help with travel planning?
faq.a10: Yes, we can assist from the planning stage, including researching barrier-free accommodations and advising on transportation. Please contact us for details.

join.pageDescription: Use your care and welfare experience to accompany travelers.
join.intro: We welcome those who want to help people who have given up on traveling. Regardless of qualifications or experience, please feel free to consult us.
join.why1Title: Those with care or welfare experience
join.why1Desc: Those with qualifications such as Certified Care Worker, Home Helper, Nurse, or Sign Language Interpreter can make full use of their experience.
join.why2Title: Those who love travel and tourism
join.why2Desc: Those familiar with Kagoshima's tourist spots, transportation, and accommodations are especially valuable. Your love of travel brings reassurance to travelers.
join.why3Desc: Those who can accompany users at their own pace and create a safe environment. We value personality just as much as skills.
join.why4Title: Those with passion, even without experience
join.why4Desc: Those without care experience can participate after completing our training. We welcome those who want to enrich someone's life through travel.
join.flow1Desc: Please feel free to contact us. We will explain the activities, conditions, and compensation.
join.flow2Desc: We verify your qualifications and experience and conduct an interview with our staff.
join.flow3Desc: Training is available for beginners or those who want to acquire travel-specific skills. Registration follows training completion.
join.flow4Desc: After registration, you can start with matched assignments. Staff support is available for your first trip.
join.cond2Value: Per-assignment contract (one trip at a time)
join.cond3Value: Care/welfare qualifications preferred (beginners can attend training)
join.cond4Value: Individually negotiated based on assignment and content
join.ctaTitle: Feel free to consult us first
join.ctaDescription: Even if you're wondering 'Can I do this?' — that's completely fine. We'll explain everything in detail.
join.trainingDesc: No experience required. A hands-on training program unique to Kagoshima, led directly by founder Shingo Fukuda.
join.bannerDesc: No qualifications or experience required. Feel free to contact us.
join.bannerCta: Apply to Register as a Supporter (Free)
join.ctaSectionDesc: We welcome those who love care, travel, or simply want to help others.
join.highlightDesc: Many people in Kagoshima want to visit an onsen but cannot do it alone. This is the only program where you learn directly from Fukuda, who has extensive onsen bathing assistance experience throughout Kagoshima.
join.fmt1Value: Approx. 12 hours (3 half-days or 2 full days)
join.fmt5Value: Active as FUKU-TABI certified travel supporter

training.pageDescription: Acquire the skills needed for travel accompaniment through practical training.
training.intro: We offer a training program specifically designed for travel accompaniment. Even those with existing qualifications are encouraged to use this as preparation for travel-specific situations.
training.overviewDesc: Practical content covering a variety of scenarios encountered during travel. Combining lectures and hands-on practice to build confidence for accompaniment.
training.curriculum1Desc: Learn the service overview, caregiver role, and fundamentals of interacting with travelers.
training.curriculum2Desc: Hands-on practice for wheelchair operation, transfer assistance, and transit boarding.
training.curriculum3Desc: Learn how to research barrier-free facilities at destinations and prepare in advance.
training.curriculum4Desc: Learn how to handle health emergencies and incidents during travel, and how to contact operations.
training.curriculum5Desc: Learn how to communicate with consideration for the traveler's feelings, appropriate language, and privacy.
training.format2Value: Approximately 8–10 hours total (spread over multiple days)
training.target1: Those with care experience but new to travel accompaniment
training.target2: Those without care qualifications who want to support travelers
training.target3: Those who want to review the skills needed for travel accompaniment
training.ctaDescription: Please contact us and we will inform you of the next training schedule.

about.pageDescription: The background behind launching this service and what we value.
about.missionDesc:
The desire to travel exists in everyone.
But for those who need physical support, travel can become something 'difficult.'

Anxiety about transportation, difficulty finding a caregiver, lack of barrier-free information — we want to remove these hurdles one by one, creating a society where everyone can enjoy travel with peace of mind.
about.storyDesc:
This service was launched by members who have been involved in welfare and care in Kagoshima Prefecture.

In our work, we repeatedly heard 'I want to travel, but it's difficult alone.' The support exists, but the system to find it doesn't — we started this service to bridge that gap.
about.value1Desc: The caregiver is not the main character — the traveler's ability to enjoy 'the places they want to go, at the pace they want' is our top priority.
about.value2Desc: Rather than a perfect system, we handle each case with care. We build trust through careful communication with both travelers and caregivers.
about.value3Desc: We start by building a track record and trust in Kagoshima. We aim to grow a locally rooted service and eventually expand nationwide.
about.operatorContactValue: Please use the inquiry form on this site
about.ctaDescription: Whether as a traveler, caregiver, or with feedback — we welcome any form of contact.
about.repDesc:
Born and raised in Kagoshima. As an acupuncturist working in medical and care settings for many years, he repeatedly heard from people who had given up on travel.

"With the right support, so many more people could enjoy traveling." — That conviction led him to found FUKU-TABI. As a universal tourism specialist, he continues to face each traveler's wish to go.
about.repCredList: Acupuncturist,Care Worker,Care Manager,Travel Manager (Domestic),Nursery Teacher,Medical Care Child Support,Childcare Support Worker,Food Sanitation Supervisor
about.repLicenseNote: Registration planned in November 2026 upon establishment of Daifuku LLC

terms.text:
FUKU-TABI Terms of Service (For Caregivers)

Article 1 (Purpose)
These terms govern the conditions for individuals acting as caregivers through FUKU-TABI.

Article 2 (Caregiver Obligations)
1. Caregivers must prioritize the safety and dignity of travelers.
2. Caregivers must not make false claims about qualifications or experience.
3. Caregivers must not disclose travelers' personal information to third parties.
4. Caregivers must not cancel without valid reason after a match is confirmed.

Article 3 (Prohibited Activities)
- Inappropriate behavior or remarks toward travelers
- Requesting money beyond stipulated compensation
- Unauthorized photography or social media posting
- Private contact information exchange through the Service

Article 4 (Disclaimer)
The Service is not liable for incidents during travel unless caused by gross negligence.

Article 5 (Cancellation of Registration)
The Service may cancel the registration of caregivers who violate these terms.
terms.pageDescription: Terms and conditions for using FUKU-TABI.
terms.s1Body: These terms define the conditions for using the travel accompaniment matching service provided by FUKU-TABI (the "Service"). Users (including travelers and caregivers) must agree to these terms before using the Service.
terms.s2Body: The Service is an intermediary service that matches travelers who need physical support with registered individual caregivers. The Service is not a direct provider of travel, but provides a matching platform.
terms.s3Body:
Users must comply with the following:
- Not provide false information
- Respect the safety and dignity of other users
- Not use personal information outside its intended purpose
- Not conduct private monetary transactions through the Service
terms.s4Body:
The following activities are prohibited:
- Unauthorized access or attacks on the system
- Defamation or harassment of other users
- Illegal activities through the Service
- Commercial use of Service information without operator permission
terms.s5Body: The Service is not liable for troubles, accidents, or damages occurring between travelers and caregivers, unless caused by the Service's intentional misconduct or gross negligence.
terms.s6Body: The Service may update these terms as necessary. Updated terms take effect when posted on the site. We will notify users of significant changes.
terms.s7Body: These terms are governed by Japanese law. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Kagoshima District Court as the court of first instance.

privacy.pageDescription: How we handle the personal information entrusted to us.
privacy.intro: The FUKU-TABI Operations Office (the "Operator") considers the protection of users' personal information an important responsibility and manages it appropriately based on the following policy.
privacy.s1Body:
The Operator may collect the following information:
- Name and contact details (email address, phone number)
- Travel wishes and required support needs
- Caregiver registration qualifications and experience
- Content entered in inquiry forms
- Site access logs (IP addresses, etc.)
privacy.s2Body:
Collected information is used for the following purposes:
- Matching travelers and caregivers
- Responding to inquiries
- Service improvement and operation
- Legal compliance
privacy.s3Body:
The Operator will not provide personal information to third parties without consent, except in the following cases:
- Minimum necessary information sharing when a match is confirmed
- Legally required disclosure requests
- Urgent necessity to protect life or property
privacy.s4Body: Personal information is managed with appropriate security measures. We work to prevent leakage, loss, and damage, and appropriately dispose of information when no longer needed.
privacy.s5Body: To request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information, please contact us via the inquiry form. We will respond within a reasonable time after identity verification.
privacy.s6Body: This site may use cookies for service improvement. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may become unavailable.
privacy.s7Body: This policy may be updated as necessary. We will notify users of significant changes on the site.
privacy.contactBody: For questions or concerns about the handling of personal information, please contact us via the inquiry form on this site.

taxi.badge: Official partnership with welfare taxi company
taxi.heading: Zero worries about getting around.
taxi.description: Worried about traveling in a wheelchair? Cannot handle all the transfers? FUKU-TABI partners with Kagoshima welfare taxi companies to support all your transportation needs.
taxi.feature1Desc: Welfare vehicles with wheelchair lifts for easy boarding. Electric wheelchairs fully supported.
taxi.feature2Title: Direct pickup from airport and stations
taxi.feature2Desc: Door-to-door service from Kagoshima Airport and Kagoshima-Chuo Station to your hotel.
taxi.feature3Desc: Qualified drivers who assist with boarding, alighting, and transfers. Safe even in emergencies.

field.pageDescription: Field notes from journeys with travelers who had given up on travel.
field.heading: Support Diary
field.subheading: Field notes from our journeys together. Stories told through photos and words.

tours.pageDescription: Kagoshima barrier-free tours combining welfare taxis and support staff. Leave all transportation, care, and sightseeing to us.
tours.preparingBanner: Tours are currently being prepared. For details and reservations,
tours.customTitle: Cannot find the tour you are looking for?
tours.customDesc: Tell us where you want to go, where to stay, and what care you need. We will create a custom plan.

partner.pageDescription: FUKU-TABI officially partners with Kagoshima welfare taxi companies. Trust us with all your travel transportation needs.
partner.whyTitle: Why our welfare taxi partnership matters
partner.whyDesc1: The main reason people give up on travel is anxiety about transportation. Arranging care taxis personally is complicated, and handling last-minute changes during travel is difficult.
partner.whyDesc2: FUKU-TABI secures transportation from the planning stage, with supporters, drivers, and travelers working together. Transportation is the gateway to travel. Making it worry-free is our mission.
partner.photosNote: Photos used with the consent of the individuals shown.
partner.featuredAlt: Onsen bathing assistance. Smiles of supporter and traveler.
partner.featuredQuote: I never thought I could get into an onsen.
partner.featuredQuoteCredit: — Mr./Ms. Komaki (80s, wheelchair user) / from travel support record
partner.taxiDesc: A specialized welfare transport company serving Kagoshima city. Dedicated service tailored to FUKU-TABI tours.
partner.vehicle4: Direct pickup from Kagoshima Airport and Kagoshima-Chuo Station
partner.ctaDesc: Feel free to inquire about transportation options, pickup areas, and vehicle availability.
partner.staffNote: Photos and names will be added once available
partner.staffComment1: I'll bring you safely and with a smile, wherever you want to go.
partner.staffComment2: Comfortable, reassuring rides for wheelchair users too.
partner.staffComment3: I'll support you wholeheartedly to make travel memories.

pillars.title: 4 Reasons to Trust FUKU-TABI
pillars.subtitle: Everything we have in place so you can say "yes" to travel
pillars.pill1Desc: Run by a qualified Domestic Travel Manager. Regional travel business registration is planned for November 2026, ensuring a legally compliant service.
pillars.pill2Desc: Certified caregivers with hands-on experience are on our team, providing tailored support for each traveler's unique needs.
pillars.pill3Desc: Exclusive partnership with a wheelchair-accessible taxi service staffed by qualified drivers — zero worry about getting around.
pillars.pill4Desc: We run our own training program to develop high-quality caregivers and maintain consistent, reliable support.
